title: Cleaner Water
description: This texture pack makes water more clean.
body:
# 💧 Cleaner Water – Texture Pack

This texture pack makes **Minecraft water much clearer**, improving underwater visibility while keeping a natural, vanilla-friendly look.

![cleaner water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e958ff59f865f98b79b67f9fb4f625433cf9e4e2.png)
## ✨ Features
- Significantly more transparent water  
- Easier to explore underwater caves, structures, and builds  
- Maintains a clean, vanilla-inspired style  
- Great for survival, building, and exploration

## 📦 Game Version
Designed for **Minecraft Java Edition**  
Compatibility: Works on **1.21+** and newer versions

## 🌊 Why Use It?
Minecraft’s default water can sometimes feel too foggy. This pack enhances clarity, letting you enjoy vibrant underwater environments without overhauling the game's visual style.

Dive in and enjoy the view! 💧
